clarificationPolicy.rationale: Places routes clarify only when the category or anchor location is still unresolved.

fallbackPolicy.rationale: Places stays in its specialized lane unless search scope is unresolved or a ranked fallback is explicitly required.

policyContract.rationale: Lane choice, fallback posture, source ranking, presentation, and verification are retained as typed runtime receipts.

presentationPolicy.rationale: Places answers should keep the map-oriented parity surface so ranking and anchor scope stay visible.

sourceRanking.rationale: The specialized places surface outranks broad search because it preserves anchor scope, category, and ranked map results.

transformationPolicy.rationale: Places turns transform ranked map results into a recommendation surface with retained search context.
